_comment: Post-campaign snapshot — The Crawling Dark resolved; Kenji resolved the forest corruption during Book 4 when he entered Amaris's territory (Millhaven/Thornfield area). Amaris holds Briarstone. Same realm as Kenji campaign (see shared_world + Documents/TTRPG/shared_world_continuity.md).
key_items: Farm — eastern defenses (bittervine, warden's root, thornmint)

quests.name: Greenveil corruption
quests.notes: Resolved by Kenji during Book 4 (operating in Millhaven/Thornfield area). Nexus destroyed or purged. Village safe. Campaign-agnostic crossover — different player solved Amaris's threat chain.

assets.name: Briarstone Homestead
assets.display: 12 acres — deed held; soil healing after corruption receded

shared_world.separation_note: Thornfield is on the eastern frontier; Kenji-scale politics and ley warfare are weeks away and off Briarstone's porch — real in-world, but not local pressure unless Amaris travels or hears late rumor.

world_events: Distant heartland (same realm): Academy politics, Bleakmoor convergence, Sundered Gate situation — per Kenji timeline; no effect on Thornfield by location unless you bring news or travel east.

Thornfield.opinion: grateful — the stranger saved them; Amaris is the mage who stayed

history.reason: Relief after corruption ended; cried on Amaris's porch

force_composition._comment: Campaign CLOSED. Amaris solo-cleared the eastern frontier crisis with no party/pets/summons/constructs. All sections empty.

canon_pointer: amaris_story.md — Epilogue: The Stranger in the Greenveil (campaign complete)
story_beat: Morning on the porch. Tea, birds back in the Greenveil, deed in the house. Amaris owns Briarstone; the crisis ended while she slept — a stranger did the work and vanished.
narrative_notes: Campaign CLOSED. Mysterious hero — identity unknown, details contradictory in village gossip.
Vareth / Nexus: resolved off-camera; no civilian casualties from final swarm (swarm never launched).
East pasture: still resting; western fields healthy. Amaris happy, farm hers.
Shared world: Kenji's active plots exist in-setting far west/central; Amaris is unaffected by distance — not ignorance of cosmology, just geography and slow news.
